title: Payment Button Unresponsive on Mobile Safari
details: Users on iOS Safari 17+ report the 'Complete Payment' button doesn't respond to taps. Tested on iPhone 14 Pro — button highlights but form doesn't submit. Console shows 'Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read property submit of null'. Workaround: users can complete checkout on desktop. Estimated revenue impact: $12K/day (15% of mobile transactions). Steps to reproduce: 1) Add item to cart 2) Proceed to checkout on iOS Safari 3) Tap 'Complete Payment' button. Expected: Form submits. Actual: Nothing happens.

title: Chart Rendering Breaks When Dataset Exceeds 10K Points
details: The sales analytics chart crashes when trying to render datasets with more than 10,000 data points. Browser freezes for 30+ seconds, then throws 'Maximum call stack size exceeded' error. This affects enterprise clients analyzing annual sales data. Currently investigating whether this is a Chart.js limitation or our data processing logic. Temporary fix: added pagination to limit initial render to 5K points. Long-term solution needed before Q2 enterprise renewals.

title: Race Condition Causes Duplicate User Accounts
details: When users rapidly click 'Sign Up' (double-click or impatient taps), our API creates duplicate accounts with the same email. Root cause: no database constraint on email uniqueness + no request debouncing on frontend. Discovered when customer support received 47 complaints about 'account already exists' errors. Fix requires: 1) Add unique constraint to emails table 2) Implement 500ms debounce on signup button 3) Add idempotency key to API requests. Priority: High — affects trial-to-paid conversion.

title: Welcome Emails Delayed by 6+ Hours
details: New user welcome emails are taking 6-12 hours to send instead of the expected 1-2 minutes. Queue inspection shows 45,000 backlogged jobs. Possible causes: 1) Email service rate limit exceeded 2) Worker nodes not scaling properly 3) Recent deploy introduced N+1 query in email template rendering. Immediate action: manually flushed queue, scaled workers from 3 to 8. Monitoring for recurrence. Users affected: ~2,300 signups from this week. Reputational risk: users think confirmation emails are broken.

title: Profile Photo Upload Fails on Android 14
details: Android 14 users cannot upload profile photos — app crashes with 'FileNotFound' exception. Works fine on Android 13 and below. Root cause: Android 14 changed scoped storage permissions. Our code still uses deprecated file:// URIs instead of content:// URIs. Fix requires updating file picker library to v3.2+ and migrating to MediaStore API. Workaround: users can upload via web app. Impact: 23% of Android users blocked from completing profile setup. Priority: High — affects onboarding completion rate.

title: Subscription Status Fails to Update on Renewal
details: Successful Stripe renewal events are failing to update user profiles to 'active'. Server logs show a '422 Unprocessable Entity' error due to a recent database migration that made the 'trial_ended_at' column mandatory without a default value. Impact: Paying users are being locked out of their accounts automatically after day 30. Workaround: Customer support must manually toggle accounts in the admin console. Priority: Critical — blocking active revenue generation streams.

title: Keyboard Navigation Traps Focus inside Search Dropdown
details: Keyboard-only users cannot exit the search suggestions dropdown menu using the 'Tab' or 'Escape' keys once it is active. The focus gets permanently trapped inside the results list loop, preventing navigation to the rest of the layout header. Discovered during an internal accessibility audit on Chrome 124. Fix requires refactoring our keydown event listener matrix to allow safe focus transfer back to the main layout body container.

title: IP Whitelisting Ignored under Heavy Load Traffic Spikes
details: During high-traffic windows, the Redis rate limiter middleware experiences internal timeout drops. When it falls back, it inadvertently throttles internal corporate service IP addresses instead of bypassing them. This causes automated monitoring background scripts to throw '429 Too Many Requests' exceptions, breaking our metrics tracking charts. Priority: High — distorts real-time cluster telemetry monitoring and performance tracking logs.

title: Reset Token Expiration Window Evaluates Imprecisely
details: The secure password reset token timeout mechanism expires links exactly 1 hour early for users operating in British Summer Time (BST) or Central European Summer Time (CEST) zones. Root cause: The calculation engine is executing an offset match against local system time variables instead of tracking absolute UTC timestamps directly inside the server database controller. Workaround: Users must request tokens twice or reset using a UTC-aligned machine workspace profiles layout.

title: Horizontal Overflow Clipping on Small Textareas
details: When a developer copy-pastes a continuous raw log stack trace string that contains no native whitespace breaks into a bug comment field box, the container layout breaks. The long text overflows the container padding width bounds and clips underneath the page border line. Fix requires applying an explicit `word-break: break-word;` layout property configuration across our card block and comment text wrapper styles inside your index.css file.
